title: triticum lolium
intro: Triticum lolium, also known as ryegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is commonly found in fields and meadows. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In terms of health benefits, ryegrass is believed to have antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. Ryegrass is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
